## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update

## Validation

- [ ] I tested this change locally.
- [ ] I verified no new runtime errors are introduced.
- [ ] I checked impacted screens and flows.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows project structure and style.
- [ ] I updated documentation if behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not include personal data files.
- [ ] I linked related issue(s), if applicable.

## Related Issues

Closes #
